query:
INSERT INTO issue (
               id,
               workspace_id,
               project_id,
               milestone_id,
               title,
               description,
               state_category,
               priority,
               archived_at,
               row_version,
               created_at,
               updated_at
           ) VALUES (
               $1,
               $2,
               $3,
               $4,
               $5,
               $6,
               'open'::issue_state_category,
               $7::text::issue_priority,
               NULL,
               0,
               $8,
               $8
           )
